subject: Cannot log in to Olivia Pro app
description: User reports a login error on the Olivia Pro grove app after a password reset.

subject: HydroSense controller firmware update fails
description: North grove HydroSense controller will not complete the latest firmware update.

subject: Feature request: organic field-diary export
description: Requesting an export of the organic field diary from Olivia Pro for EU certification records.

subject: Olivia Pro sensor sync fails
description: Soil-moisture sensor readings stop syncing to Olivia Pro for large grove blocks.

subject: How to add a second grove operator
description: Customer asking how to invite the farmhand as an additional Olivia Pro user.

subject: Drip-zone calibration on North grove
description: Requesting help calibrating the precision drip zones on the HydroSense controller.

subject: Olivia Pro app crashes on startup
description: App crashes immediately on the Samsung Galaxy A53 after the latest update.

subject: HydroSense valve schedule not applying
description: Configured irrigation schedule on the HydroSense controller is not running at the set times.

subject: HydroSense controller loses Wi-Fi at night
description: North grove HydroSense controller drops the Wi-Fi connection overnight.

subject: Olivia Pro map tiles not loading
description: Grove map tiles fail to load in Olivia Pro on a slow rural connection.

subject: Request: add Arbequina test-plot block
description: Asking to add the Arbequina test plot as a new block in Olivia Pro.

subject: HydroSense flow meter reads zero
description: Sector 3 flow meter on the HydroSense controller reports zero during irrigation.

subject: How to export organic field diary to PDF
description: Customer asks how to export the organic field diary as a PDF for inspectors.

subject: Olivia Pro push alerts not arriving
description: Frost-risk push alerts from Olivia Pro are not reaching the phone.

subject: HydroSense valve stuck open on sector 4
description: Solenoid valve on sector 4 stays open after the irrigation cycle ends.

subject: Request: weekly water-use report email
description: Requesting an automated weekly water-use summary email from Olivia Pro.

subject: HydroSense firmware rollback needed
description: Latest firmware caused instability; requesting a rollback procedure.

subject: Olivia Pro sync slow after harvest data import
description: App sync is slow after importing the 2025 harvest data set.

subject: Add second operator for Olivia Pro east grove
description: Asking to invite the new farmhand as an operator for the east grove.

subject: HydroSense rain sensor pauses irrigation incorrectly
description: Rain sensor pauses irrigation even when no rain has fallen.
